lines.zh: 你把我帶回原點
lines.kuso: You take me back
lines.romaji: You take me back

jp.t: And show me you're the only one

lines.zh: 讓我以為你就是唯一
lines.kuso: And show me you're the only one
lines.romaji: And show me you're the only one

jp.t: Reveal the way you got me

lines.zh: 揭穿你綁住我的方法
lines.kuso: Reveal the way you got me
lines.romaji: Reveal the way you got me

lines.zh: 我必須逃離
lines.kuso: I've got to run
lines.romaji: I've got to run

lines.zh: 你卻還活著
lines.kuso: You're still alive
lines.romaji: You're still alive

jp.t: I'm never gonna take your feeling which is complicated

lines.zh: 我絕不會去承擔你那糾結的情緒
lines.kuso: I'm never gonna take your feeling which is complicated
lines.romaji: I'm never gonna take your feeling which is complicated

jp.t: まれてねじられここまで

lines.zh: 被踩被扭曲一路走到這裡
lines.kuso: 福馬咧貼 內基拉咧 摳摳媽爹
lines.romaji: fumarete nejirare koko made

lines.zh: 這條走過的路前方
lines.kuso: 阿雲達 摳諾 米七諾 撒奇哇
lines.romaji: ayunda kono michi no saki wa

jp.r: みかいたくちりょういき

lines.zh: 不想讓任何人踏進來 那是未開拓的領域
lines.kuso: 達咧逆某 福米摳馬咧他哭哇那衣 米開他哭七 溜衣奇
lines.romaji: dare ni mo fumikomaretaku wa nai mikaitakuchi ryouiki

jp.t: れられてしまえば Break me up

lines.zh: 要是被觸碰到 我就會崩潰
lines.kuso: 福咧拉咧貼 西媽欸巴 Break me up
lines.romaji: furerarete shimaeba Break me up

jp.t: えりゃ Wait for a moment

lines.zh: 等我整理好 先等一下
lines.kuso: 投投諾欸里呀 Wait for a moment
lines.romaji: totonoerya Wait for a moment

jp.t: ここらでさぁ Falling out yeah

lines.zh: 就在這裡啊 一切要崩盤了
lines.kuso: 摳摳拉爹撒～ Falling out yeah
lines.romaji: kokora de saa Falling out yeah

jp.t: ギリギリで Runs out of time

lines.zh: 在最後關頭 時間已經用完
lines.kuso: 給力給力爹 Runs out of time
lines.romaji: girigiri de Runs out of time

lines.zh: 你感覺到了吧！
lines.kuso: You can feel it!
lines.romaji: You can feel it!

lines.zh: 我已經無法再相信你
lines.kuso: I can't believe in you
lines.romaji: I can't believe in you

jp.t: I'd see you another day another way

lines.zh: 改天用別的方式再見吧
lines.kuso: I'd see you another day another way
lines.romaji: I'd see you another day another way

lines.zh: 身邊沒有任何人
lines.kuso: Nobody's standing near
lines.romaji: Nobody's standing near

jp.t: There's something you can't see or feel baby

lines.zh: 有些東西你看不見也感受不到 baby
lines.kuso: There's something you can't see or feel baby
lines.romaji: There's something you can't see or feel baby

lines.zh: 自我的執念空虛地走向終點
lines.kuso: 基摳諾 欸狗 母那西哭 油哭斯欸
lines.romaji: jiko no ego munashiku yuku sue

lines.zh: 是啊 我很抱歉
lines.kuso: Yeah, I'm sorry
lines.romaji: Yeah, I'm sorry

jp.t: えはなはだしくてもう dou

lines.zh: 誤解得太離譜 已經 dou
lines.kuso: 哈奇七嘎欸 哈那哈打西哭貼 謀～ dou
lines.romaji: hakichigae hanahadashikute mou dou

lines.zh: 全都錯過了 out there?
lines.kuso: 衣奇七嘎衣 out there?
lines.romaji: ikichigai out there?

lines.zh: out there no no no...
lines.kuso: out there no no no...
lines.romaji: out there no no no...

lines.zh: (我快崩潰了！)
lines.kuso: (I'm breaking down!)
lines.romaji: (I'm breaking down!)

jp.t: I keep on trying to reach you with my broken legs

lines.zh: 我用這雙傷痕累累的腿 不停想走到你身邊
lines.kuso: I keep on trying to reach you with my broken legs
lines.romaji: I keep on trying to reach you with my broken legs

jp.t: How many times have you seen me when I fall

lines.zh: 你看過我跌倒過多少次
lines.kuso: How many times have you seen me when I fall
lines.romaji: How many times have you seen me when I fall

jp.t: But now I know you're not the only thing like before

lines.zh: 但現在我懂了 你已經不再是我心中唯一
lines.kuso: But now I know you're not the only thing like before
lines.romaji: But now I know you're not the only thing like before

jp.t: not the one I need to share

lines.zh: 也不是我想分享一切的人
lines.kuso: not the one I need to share
lines.romaji: not the one I need to share

lines.zh: 無聊透頂 毫無意義 去他的吧
lines.kuso: 哭打拉那衣 衣米某那衣 哭搜哭拉欸
lines.romaji: kudaranai imi mo nai kuso kurae

jp.t: かるよ バカじゃない

lines.zh: 這點事我懂啦 我又不是笨蛋
lines.kuso: 搜咧古拉衣 哇咖嚕優 巴咖加那衣
lines.romaji: sore gurai wakaru yo baka ja nai
